name: Sewaddle

abilities.effect: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Echoed Voice
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Echoed Voice attack does 50 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Druddigon
description: It races through narrow caves, using its sharp claws to catch prey. The skin on its face is harder than a rock.

abilities.name: Rough Skin
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon and is damaged by an opponent’s attack (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), put 2 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.

attacks.name: Clutch
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

name: Bouffalant
description: Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.

attacks.name: Revenge
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during his or her last turn, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Head Charge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

name: Tornadus
description: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.

attacks.name: Energy Wheel
attacks.effect: Move an Energy from 1 of your Benched Pokémon to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hurricane
attacks.effect: Move a basic Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Bianca
effect: Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

name: Cedric Juniper
effect: Put a Pokémon from your hand face down in front of you and tell your opponent its name. Your opponent guesses the height of that Pokémon. Reveal that Pokémon. If your opponent guessed right, he or she draws 3 cards. If your opponent guessed wrong, you draw 3 cards. Return the Pokémon to your hand. (You can’t choose a Pokémon that doesn’t have the height printed on the card.)

name: Crushing Hammer
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to 1 of your opponent’s Pokémon.

name: Energy Switch
effect: Move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

name: Double Colorless Energy
effect: Double Colorless Energy provides ColorlessColorless Energy.

name: Reshiram
description: This Pokémon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blue Flare
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Zekrom
description: This Pokémon appears in legends. In its tail, it has a giant generator that creates electricity.

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Bolt Strike
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 40 damage to itself.

name: Snivy
description: Being exposed to sunlight makes its movements swifter. It uses vines more adeptly than its hands.

attacks.name: Growth
attacks.effect: Attach a Grass Energy card from your hand to this Pokémon.

name: Gardevoir
description: To protect its Trainer, it will expend all its psychic power to create a small black hole.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Eternal Radiance
attacks.effect: Move all damage counters from this Pokémon to the Defending Pokémon. This Pokémon can't use Eternal Radiance during your next turn.

attacks.name: Brilliant Voice
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage times the number of your Pokémon that have the Round attack.

name: Stunfisk
description: When its opponent can't be paralyzed, it contorts itself with unexpected speed and flops away.

attacks.name: Attract
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

name: Purrloin
description: Their cute act is a ruse. They trick people and steal their valuables just to see the looks on their faces.

attacks.name: Captivate
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with the Defending Pokémon.

name: Eevee
description: Thanks to its unstable genetic makeup, this special Pokémon conceals many different possible evolutions.

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Teddiursa
description: It lets honey soak into its paws so it can lick them all the time. Every set of paws tastes unique.

attacks.name: Honey Snack
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Ursaring
description: In its territory, it leaves scratches on trees that bear delicious berries or fruits.

attacks.name: Picnic Weather
attacks.effect: Put a Teddiursa from your discard pile onto your Bench. Then, attach an Energy card from your discard pile to that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.

name: Audino
description: Using the feelers on its ears, it can tell how someone is feeling or when an egg might hatch.

attacks.name: Relaxed Roll
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

name: Minccino
description: Minccino greet each other by grooming one another thoroughly with their tails.

attacks.name: Tail Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Cinccino
description: Cinccino's body is coated in a special oil that helps it deflect attacks, such as punches.

abilities.name: Smooth Coat
abilities.effect: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Echoed Voice
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Echoed Voice attack does 50 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Servine
description: When it gets dirty, its leaves can't be used in photosynthesis, so it always keeps itself clean.

attacks.name: Leaf Blade
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

name: Elesa
effect: Search your deck for 3 Pokémon Tool cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Synthesis
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Grass Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Revenge Blast
attacks.effect: Does 30 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken.

name: Reshiram
description: This legendary Pokémon can scorch the world with fire. It helps those who want to build a world of truth.

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blue Flare
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Emolga
description: It glides on its outstretched membrane while shocking foes with the electricity stored in the pouches on its cheeks.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

abilities.name: Versatile
abilities.effect: This Pokémon can use the attacks of any Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's). (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

attacks.name: Replace
attacks.effect: Move as many Energy attached to your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Brilliant Voice
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep. If tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage times the number of your Pokémon that have the Round attack.

name: Serperior
description: It only gives its all against strong opponents who are not fazed by the glare from Serperior's noble eyes.

abilities.name: Royal Garden
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon has any Grass Energy attached to it, this Pokémon has no Retreat Cost.

name: Growlithe
description: Extremely loyal to its Trainer, it will bark at those who approach the Trainer unexpectedly and run them out of town.

attacks.name: Rest
attacks.effect: Heal all damage from this Pokémon. This Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Torchic
description: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees F.

name: Piplup
description: A poor walker, it often falls down. However, its strong pride makes it puff up its chest without a care.

attacks.name: Charm
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 20 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Pikachu
description: It occasionally uses an electric shock to recharge a fellow Pikachu that is in a weakened state.

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Ralts
description: If its horns capture the warm feelings of people or Pokémon, its body warms up slightly.

attacks.name: Hypnotic Gaze
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Kirlia
description: If its Trainer becomes happy, it overflows with energy, dancing joyously while spinning about.

attacks.name: Tiptoe Step
attacks.effect: Draw a card for each Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Double Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.
